debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

proof:
have hlen : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  have hcount (e : Sym2 V) : edgeCount p e = p.edges.count e := by
    simp [edgeCount, List.count, BEq.beq]
  rw [hlen, Finset.sum_coe_sort, edgeSet]
  simp [hcount, List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]
successful_attempts:
have hlen : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  have hcount (e : Sym2 V) : edgeCount p e = p.edges.count e := by
    simp [edgeCount, List.count, BEq.beq]
  rw [hlen, Finset.sum_coe_sort, edgeSet]
  simp [hcount, List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]
